name: 3k-codestyle
description: Linter and formatter enforcing 3Kingdoms MUD LPC codestyle conventions

3k-codestyle.enable.description: Enable/disable the 3K codestyle linter and formatter.

3k-codestyle.lint.pragmaStrongTypes.description: Require #pragma strong_types as the first line of .c files.

3k-codestyle.lint.lineLength.description: Warn on lines exceeding the maximum length.

3k-codestyle.lint.allmanBrackets.description: Require Allman-style braces (opening brace on its own line).

3k-codestyle.lint.voidReturn.description: Require explicit return; at end of void functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.statusType.description: Suggest using status type instead of int for boolean functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.singleStatementBracket.description: Flag unnecessary brackets on single-statement if/else.

3k-codestyle.lint.superCreate.description: Warn if create(), init(), or reset() do not call their parent (::) version in .c files.

3k-codestyle.lint.unwrappedString.description: Warn when output functions (write, tell_object, ansi_write, etc.) have long strings not wrapped in word_wrap(). Context-aware: skips create()/reset(), distinguishes single-target vs multi-target functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.fileStructureOrder.description: Hint when file sections are out of order: pragma, includes, defines, inherit, globals/prototypes, one-liners, create(), init(), reset(), other functions.

3k-codestyle.lint.forwardReference.description: Warn when a function is called before it is defined and has no forward prototype declaration.
